headline: Texas Instruments IsoShield Power Modules Target Data Center And EV Demand
summary: Texas Instruments (NasdaqGS:TXN) has introduced new isolated power modules that use its proprietary IsoShield packaging technology. The company states that these modules are designed to improve power density, efficiency, and safety for uses such as data centers and electric vehicles. This product announcement marks a fresh development in Texas Instruments' power management portfolio that has not been covered in earlier articles here. For readers following Texas Instruments, this launch fits...
